versions.version_description: Revised and simplified chord structure, capo retains song's original key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
"I Knew I Loved You"
Performed by Savage Garden
Written by Darren Hayes & Daniel Jones
Tabbed by DarkDragon
jalvine@usa.net


[Intro]

[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D2[/ch]
e -----0-0- | -0-- | -0- | -2-4-5- | -5-4- | --2- | --0-
B -2-3----- | --3- | --- | ------- | ----- | -2-- | ----
G --------- | ---- | --- | ------- | ----- | ---- | -2--
D --------- | ---- | --- | ------- | ----- | ---- | ----
A --------- | ---- | --- | ------- | ----- | ---- | ----
E --------- | ---- | --- | ------- | ----- | ---- | ----[/tab]

[tab]PATTERN
e ------- for all chords except D          e ----------| for D chord
B ---X---                B ---X------------------------|
G -----X-                G --X-X-----------------------|
D --X----                D -X--------------------------|
A -X-----                A ----------------------------|
E -------                E ----------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
May-be it's in-tu-i-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
But some things you just don't ques-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Like in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I see my fu-ture in an in-stant[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
And there it goes[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I think I've found my best friend[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I know that it might sound more than a lit-tle cra-zy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]D2[/ch]
But I be-lieve[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I think I dreamed you in-to life[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]D2[/ch]
I have been wait-ing all my life[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
There's just no rhyme or rea-son[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
On-ly this sense of com-ple-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
And in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I see the miss-ing pie-ces[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I'm seaching for[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I think I've found my way home[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I know that it might sound more than a lit-tle cra-zy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]D/E[/ch]
But I be-lieve[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I think I dreamed you in-to life[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I have been wait-ing all my life[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
ooooh   ooh     aaaaah[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]
A thous-and ang-els dance a-round you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
ooooh   ooh     aaaaah[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
I am com-plete now that I've found you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
I think I dreamed you in-to life[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
I have been waiting all my life[/tab]


[OUTTRO]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
I think I dreamed you in-to life[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
I knew I loved[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch] (fade)
I knew I loved[/tab]


CHORDS
        EADGBe
[ch]A[/ch]       x02220
[ch]Bm7[/ch]     022432
[ch]C#m7[/ch]    044654
[ch]D[/ch]       xx0232
[ch]D2[/ch]      xx0230
[ch]E[/ch]       022100
[ch]F#m[/ch]     244222 or xx4222
[ch]F#m[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]  xx2222

OUTTRO CHORDS AND LAST CHORUS CHORDS
        EADGBe
[ch]Bb[/ch]      x13331
[ch]Cm7[/ch]     x35343
[ch]Eb[/ch]      x68886
        [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]       x 8 10 10 10 8
